headline: Amazon debuts Masters coverage, becoming the tournament's fourth-ever media partner
summary: Amazon will have two hours of exclusive Masters coverage Thursday and Friday in its debut year as a media partner for the prestigious golf tournament.

raw.headline: Amazon debuts Masters coverage, becoming the tournament's fourth-ever media partner

headline: Nvidia Pushes Telcos Into AI Era With New Grid Vision
summary: Nvidia deepens telecom push with its AI Grid model, but analysts say monetization remains the key test for telcos.

headline: Comcast Technology Solutions Selected by Great American Media for Managed Channel Origination and Distribution
summary: In advance of the 2026 NAB Show, Comcast Technology Solutions (CTS) today announced a new multi-year agreement with Great American Media to provide managed channel origination, playout, and transmission services using Comcast MediaOrigination, part of the Comcast Media360™ product portfolio.

headline: A Box Office Boom? What Hollywood's 2026 Spring And Summer Slate Means For The Economy
summary: Strong YTD box office ticket sales suggest consumers are still spending selectively despite inflation and macro uncertainty
